seo.title: Is your holiday rental found by AI? | GEO-Scan
seo.description: How ArdenNest discovered that AI systems couldn't find their business — and why that led to GEO-Scan.be. Free scan for every entrepreneur.

title: Is your holiday rental found by AI?
intro: Most likely not. AI systems like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews read websites differently than humans — and most holiday rentals aren't built for that. GEO-Scan shows you in one click how visible your property is to AI. Built by a software engineer with 20+ years of experience, who discovered this problem firsthand with this very website.

whyRelevant.title: Why this matters
whyRelevant.content: GEO-Scan analyses technical factors that determine whether AI systems can read and recommend your website: structured data, HTML semantics, crawlability and machine-readable markup. More and more travellers are asking their questions not to Google, but to ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot. If your website isn't readable by those systems, you simply don't exist in their answer.

bid.title: Bid Management & Strategy

platform.title: Online Platform Specialist
platform.description: Building and optimising online learning platforms (including Fourcast Academy)

origin.title: The origin of GEO-Scan
origin.story1: Christophe has been running a holiday rental in the Belgian Ardennes for 17 years — ArdenNest. When AI systems like ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews became increasingly popular, he noticed something: when you asked ChatGPT about holiday homes in the Ardennes, his business was nowhere to be found.
origin.story2: Not because the website was bad, but because AI couldn't read it. That was the trigger to investigate how AI systems read, understand and recommend websites.
origin.story3: GEO-Scan is the tool he first built for himself. Now available for every entrepreneur.

festinaLente.subtitle: Festina Lente
festinaLente.text1: GEO-Scan is an initiative of Festina Lente bv. The name — Latin for "make haste slowly" — reflects our philosophy: research thoroughly, build thoughtfully, and deliver value step by step.
festinaLente.text2: We believe that every Belgian entrepreneur deserves clear, actionable insights about their online visibility — without jargon, without expensive consultants.

score.title: Our own score: 96/100
score.alt: GEO-Scan result for ardennest.be: score 96 out of 100 — Excellent

attribution: GEO-Scan.be is an initiative by Christophe, co-owner of ArdenNest.
